description.value:
**Benefit:** Select one ranger trap. You may use this trap a number of times per day equal to your Wisdom bonus (minimum 1). The DC for your trap is equal to 10 + 1/2 your characterâs level + your Wisdom bonus, and it lasts 1 day per two character levels. If you are not a ranger, you can only set extraordinary traps with this feat; like all extraordinary ranger traps, this decreases the trap DC by 2.

**Special:** A ranger may use ranger traps a number of times per day equal to 1/2 his ranger level plus his Wisdom bonus.
